programme.title: Across The Tracks [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Two brothers: one a drug-dealing layabout, while the other is a hardworking "model son." When the one begins straigtening himself out the other is jealous.

programme.title: Jack's Back [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: In a sickening coincidence -- or a sinister homage to actual crimes -- women are being murdered in Los Angeles 100 years after Jack the Ripper terrorized London. Police think John Westford, a young doctor, is the murderer, and when he's found hanging from a noose, authorities believe his apparent suicide is a tacit admission of guilt. But his twin brother, Rick (also Spader), insists John was killed, and, when it appears Rick is right, the investigation takes a stunning turn.

programme.title: My Baby Gone
programme.desc: Pregnant Emily bonds quickly with her pregnant neighbor Kelly, but Kelly is faking it and plans to steal Emily's baby.

programme.title: Cold Blood
programme.desc: A legendary retired hit man (Jean Reno) lives in isolation in the barren North American wilderness. When he rescues a woman from a snowmobiling accident, he soon discovers that she's harboring a secret that forces him to return to his lethal ways.

programme.title: Heathers [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Veronica (Winona Ryder) is part of the most popular clique at her high school, but she disapproves of the other girls' cruel behavior. When Veronica and her new boyfriend, J.D. (Christian Slater), confront clique leader Heather Chandler (Kim Walker) and accidentally poison her, they make it appear a suicide. Soon Veronica realizes that J.D. is intentionally killing students he does not like. She races to stop J.D. while also clashing with the clique's new leader, Heather Duke (Shannen Doherty).

programme.title: Homefront
programme.desc: A former DEA agent moves his family to a quiet town, where he soon tangles with a local meth druglord.

programme.title: Funny Games
programme.desc: Two violent young men take a mother, father, and son hostage in their vacation cabin and force them to play sadistic "games" with one another for their own amusement.

programme.title: Seven Samurai
programme.desc: Farmers from a village exploited by bandits hire a veteran samurai for protection, and he gathers six other samurai to join him.

programme.title: Vacancy
programme.desc: A late night detour leads to an unimaginable nightmare when an estranged couple’s car breaks down on a remote country road. Finding themselves stranded on a dark and deserted two-lane highway, David Fox and his soon-to-be ex-wife Amy are forced to spend the night at a seedy motel run by an odd but seemingly harmless proprietor. In their filthy, threadbare room, the bickering couple finds a cache of homemade slasher films that look disturbingly real. Once they realize the blood-soaked videos were shot in the very room in which they’re staying, David and Amy know they will be the sadistic filmmakers’ next victims unless they put aside their differences and work together to escape.

programme.title: The Fog
programme.desc: One hundred years after their ship was deliberately wrecked, the ghosts of the murdered seaman have returned to Antonio Bay to exact a ghastly vengeance.

programme.title: Mary Reilly
programme.desc: A housemaid is attracted both to her master and to his darkly mysterious assistant.

programme.title: All The Pretty Horses
programme.desc: Two Texas cowboys head to Mexico in search of work, but soon find themselves in trouble with the law after one of them falls in love with a wealthy rancher's daughter.

programme.title: Easy Rider
programme.desc: A landmark road film, EASY RIDER chronicles the search for freedom by two motorcycle-riding drifters (Peter Fonda and Dennis Hopper) who meet up with alcoholic lawyer, Jack Nicholson in a southern jail. Nicholson gets them out and then joins them on their liberating journey.

programme.title: Tight Spot
programme.desc: A wise-cracking female inmate falls for a detective who wants her to testify against her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: The Undercover Man
programme.desc: Al Capone's arrest for tax evasion was the inspiration behind THE UNDERCOVER MAN, a crime thriller in which Glenn Ford stars as a Treasury Department employee out to nab a character referred to only as the "Big Fellow" (Den Harvey) who owes more than $3 million in back taxes.

programme.title: Hellcats Of The Navy
programme.desc: A submarine commander faces suspicions that jealousy led him to abandon a crewman during a secret mission inside Japanese waters.

programme.title: Queen Bee
programme.desc: A seemingly-gracious Southern socialite rules her circle of family and friends with an iron fist.

programme.title: Prison on Fire
programme.desc: A man sent to prison for manslaughter learns how to survive in with the help of a fellow inmate

programme.title: House (1985)
programme.desc: A troubled writer moves into a haunted house after inheriting it from his aunt.

programme.title: The Killer [Dubbed]
programme.desc: A disillusioned assassin accepts one last hit in hopes of using his earnings to restore vision to a singer he accidentally blinded.

programme.title: The Decline Of Western Civilization
programme.desc: Penelope Spheeris' The Decline Of Western Civilization is a riveting, unflinching and hard-core film which adeptly captures the spirit of a major cultural phenomenon. Including performances by X, Circle Jerks, Black Flag, Catholic Discipline, Germs and Alice Bag Band. Breaking down barriers of expression and social mores, the Decline punks were against everything: They gave birth to an anti-establishment view of the world that permeates today's music, politics, social attitudes, styles and trends. The film documents their deliberate reaction to the mass commercialism of music; it is a blatant and angry rejection of the mainstream. Burgeoning at the time, many of the punk bands first seen here have become legendary. The effect of the film on current day music, styles and trends is immeasurable.

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: A father goes undercover and infiltrates a Mexican drug cartel for the DEA in order to free his son.

programme.title: Blood Brother
programme.desc: Jake goes to prison to protect his friends, and one becomes a cop. When Jake is released, he seeks revenge.

programme.title: Semper Fi
programme.desc: When his brother is given an unfair prison sentence, a Marine is torn between his code and loyalty to family.

programme.title: Blood Out
programme.desc: Michael goes undercover to take justice into his own hands after his brother is murdered by a gang.

programme.title: Righteous Kill
programme.desc: Two veteran New York City detectives hunt a vigilante who may be one of their own..

programme.title: Joe Baby
programme.desc: A money collector for a private investigator is hired to track down 10 million dollars stolen in a dodgy real estate deal, opening a complex can of worms.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: The Knight of Shadows
programme.desc: A legendary demon hunter investigates the disappearance of young girls from a village.

programme.title: Railroad Tigers

Unarmed and outnumbered, they must rely on their wits to battle an entire army.

programme.desc: While visiting his estranged daughter at a nightclub, a police captain must spring into action when a kidnapping plan unravels right before his eyes.

programme.title: Perfect Child

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie

programme.title: A Daughter's Revenge
programme.desc: Elle Spencer has devised a terrifying plan...

programme.title: House of Chains
programme.desc: The story of a seemingly normal family whose dark secrets remained hidden.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: Kristin was a poor girl from California.

programme.title: My Family's Secret
programme.desc: Lara investigates her husband's suicide attempt and lands in danger.

programme.title: A Mother's Sacrifice
programme.desc: A mother fear that her daughter has been abducted when a phone call is interrupted by something suspicious.

programme.title: Meet Me in New York
programme.desc: Events planner Kelly meets her match in web editor Joe when planning his niece's birthday party.

programme.title: Falling for the Manny
programme.desc: Alice is up for partner at her firm and hires her sister’s manny, Jacob, to help with her daughter.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Liz and Kappa Psi Psi prep for Gamma Fair and T-shirt sales. Alan’s class inspires Anna’s look change.

programme.title: The Bouquet
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.title: I'll Be There
programme.desc: More than a decade after distancing herself from her complicated family, Grace's carefully built life is upended when her brother AJ is diagnosed with cancer. As her estranged siblings reunite in Los Angeles, Grace is forced to confront old wounds, buried loyalties, and the role she once played in her fractured family-set against the surreal backdrop of Michael Jackson's death.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Former Marine John "Falcon" Chapman is a dark anti-hero driven by guilt and suffering from PTSD, who will destroy himself unless given something else to destroy - a useful weapon-of-last-resort for the U.S. State Department.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: Traffickers
programme.desc: Tiffany Cooper, disgraced by the military, wanted by the cops and running out of time, stops at nothing to take down a Trafficking Operation and save these young girls. Nothing is what it seems when everyone seems to be against you. Trust No One.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: Vices
programme.desc: Simone, a married woman battling anxiety and the lingering shadow of her past alcoholism, escapes to collect her thoughts. When a storm isolates her in her remote cabin, she’s hunted by two forces: the seductive pull of her past addiction, and a cunning serial killer. Surrounded by a web of lies and sin, Simone must face her inner demons before a literal one ends her life.

programme.title: The Last Days of an Escort
programme.desc: Kitty, a struggling escort, agrees to be documented for a film. Her roommate, Star, a more successful escort, reluctantly joins. A new client, Earl, changes their lives forever when he asks to see Kitty and Star together. Kitty's world becomes increasingly dangerous as she navigates the dark underworld of escorting.

programme.title: What Momma Says
programme.desc: Nearly thirty, Paul Thomas, is still living with his mom. When Paul cannot pay his half of the rent, she kicks him out, forcing Paul to sink or swim when it comes to taking care of himself.

programme.title: Rich Intent
programme.desc: 16-year-old Quana yearns to go to her very first concert. When she gets the opportunity to see her favorite artist, her dreams quickly spiral into a horrific nightmare of imprisonment and shady deals.

programme.title: Twisted Marriage
programme.desc: Dexter and Ashley are a married couple, who are close friends with Mary and Paul. On a whim, they decide to swing spouses for the weekend, which leads to questions about their feelings and if their marriages will survive.

programme.title: Garrett Morris and Michael Schultz
programme.desc: The story of the careers of legendary actor Garrett Morrison and legendary movie director Michael Schultz. Follow their life and career from their early beginnings to adulthood and becoming worldwide legendary artists from Broadway to Hollywood.

programme.title: Haunting of Winchester House
programme.desc: A family moves into a mansion to act as caretakers, but a malevolent force abducts their daughter.

programme.title: The Haunting of Whaley House
programme.desc: Amateur ghost hunters break into America's Most Haunted House which turns into more horror than imagined.

programme.title: King of the Lost World
programme.desc: In a modern adaptation of Arthur Conan Doyle's classic, a plane crashes into a land of mysterious creatures.

programme.title: Hansel VS Gretel
programme.desc: Under a spell, Gretel creates a coven of witches. Hansel must fight his twin and the forces controlling her.

programme.title: Planet Dune
programme.desc: A rescue mission on a desert planet turns deadly when they find the planet’s apex predators: giant sandworms.

programme.title: The Beyond (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The seven dreaded gateways to hell are concealed in seven cursed places... And on the day the gates of hell are opened, the dead will walk the earth!From legendary Italian horror master Lucio Fulci come the ultimate classic of supernatural terror. A remote and cursed hotel, built over one of the seven gateways, becomes a yawning malevolent abyss that begins devouring both the bodies and the souls of all who enter in a graphic frenzy of gory crucifixions, chunkblowing chain-whippings, eyeball impalements, sulfuric acid meltdowns, flesh-eating tarantulas, throat-shredding demon dogs and ravenous bloodthirsty zombies. THE BEYOND is a towering achievement in hair-raising, mind-bending cinematic terror!

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre: Legacy Of Blood (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Elvira presents this horror thriller where a family is stalked by an unknown killer while attending the reading of a relative's will.

programme.title: Becoming Evil - Serial Killers
programme.desc: 21st-century America is a technological wonder: cell phones, internet, 24 hour news media, DNA breakthroughs, people on the move, and expanding urban centers. But many of the old problems remain: drug addiction, homelessness, prostitution, poverty, gangs, murder, and serial killing. Starting in the 1990s serial killing in America has transitioned and adapted to the changing world, while at the same time in many ways staying the same. What has changed: There is new forensic technology particularly DNA analysis, better cooperation between law-enforcement jurisdictions, increasing awareness and fascination in the media and on the Internet with the serial killer.Most importantly there are new psychological understandings of the serial killer.

programme.title: Nightbeast
programme.desc: An alien with an appetite for blood and disembowelment is set loose on a small town when its spacecraft crashes and explodes. When sheriff Jack Cinder and the local militia arrive on scene to investigate, a violent battle ensues, leaving only Jack, his sensuous lady deputy and a wild-eyed redneck and survivors. With a corrupt mayor unwilling to stand up against the Nightbeast's reign of carnage and destruction, it's up to Jack to evacuate the townsfolk and save the day!

programme.title: Humanoids From The Deep (Edited Version)
programme.desc: A race of scientifically created half-human, half-salmon monstrosities lay siege to a Pacific Northwest fishing village. In horrific fashion, the mutated creatures kill the men and mate with the women in order to reproduce. Can the Humanoids From the Deep be stopped before they destroy mankind as we know it?Soundtrack scored by Oscar-winning composer James Horner (Avatar, Titanic, Braveheart). Creature design from Oscar-winning make-up artist Rob Bottin (Total Recall, The Thing, Robocop, Se7en).

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A movie buff opens a prop museum, but a rival collector could put everything at risk. Then, Jackson is being followed by a dark force, but will his attempts to rid himself of it work?

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: An art collector could never have anticipated the ways a terrifying painting would change his life. Then, life in prison is tough, but Elmer's pet spiders always have his back.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A siren lures a doctor into her trap to carry out a diabolical plan. Then, a teenage girl must fight off a demonic plague when she realizes her family might be infected.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Tim finds the answer to needing more hours in the day, but is it worth the cost? Then, when a small town opens a time capsule, the local librarian must try to keep history from repeating itself.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A family is detained, and a young girl's distressing symptoms quickly escalate without her medication. Then, when the dead rise from their graves, townspeople take justice into their own hands.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Cassie is being chased by a monster, and endangers a kind stranger when she asks for help- but what can they do? Then, a celebrated photographer is tormented after an award-winning photograph has more consequences than just fame.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A horror novelist's agent offers him help overcoming his writer's block, and the struggling author can't resist. Then, Richard's wife is attacked and becomes a shell of the woman he loved. He'll do anything to help her feel better.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Lyle is a disappointment, and when his parents meddle in his life and their plan backfires, he must deal with the aftermath. Then, Marcia takes her stepdaughter to her grandmother's house to claim their inheritance, and nothing can stand in her way.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: The Belaskos get more than they bargained for when they move in next door to a vampire-hating suburbanite. Then, a father and son bond by playing an old video game, but soon find out there's a reason it was abandoned.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's First Date" - Mr. Drysdale convinces his self-absorbed stepson Sonny to date Elly May to Mrs. Drysdale's consternation, while Granny and Jed make preparations for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro Goes to School" - Jed enrolls Jethro at an exclusive Beverly Hills elementary school. Millicent Schuyler-Potts, the proprietor of the school, is aghast when Jed and Jethro show up, convinced this is part of some ghastly hoax. After Jed says that banker Milburn Drysdale is his neighbor, she calls the banker. It turns out that Drysdale's bank holds the mortgage on the school. Schulyer-Potts suddenly warms to the charms of the Clampetts, even if it means accepting Jethro as a fifth grader.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Servants" - Ellie May starts wearing dresses but takes it as an insult when someone says she looks like a city girl. Mr. Drysdale talks Jed into taking in his butler and upstairs girl in a plan to civilize the Clampetts, but they don't quite understand the idea of servants. Miss Hathaway takes Jethro bowling and begins to show an interest in him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Trick or Treat" - Granny wants to go home because "folks is so unfriendly, no one has come to call." Jed convinces her that they should call on them, and they find that people welcome them and give them all manner of gifts when they show up on Halloween in their normal hillbilly clothes. Also, Jed works on getting Pearl to come visit while she's trying to get hitched to the oilman and find a young man for Jethrine.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Plays Solomon" - Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police. When one of the officers takes Pearl out, Granny thinks she got Pearl in trouble and becomes sad and contrite. Meanwhile, the police find her still, and new trouble results.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Throws a Wingding" - Flatt and Scruggs and their wives come to visit their old sweetheart, but Pearl thinks they're there to propose. Jed throws a wingding for them and the duo play music for the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's Animals" - When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police. Mrs. Drysdale also calls the dog catcher on Duke.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage" - Mrs Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house. However, the Clampett's think he's wanting to marry Pearl, so Jed comes up with a plan to "save" the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed's Dilemma" - Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Rescues Pearl" - Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down. Jed didn't count on Mr. Brewster's background in the theater and him making a huge production out of it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "No Place Like Home" - Back home for Christmas, Elly May bonds with her old animal friends, while Pearl plays the piano for the "new" movie in town (the silent version of Ben Hur) to impress Mr. Brewster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Home for Christmas" - Jed, Ellie May, Jethro and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Great Feud" - Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Races Jetherine" - When Sonny Drysdale promises to give Elly May a ring, Granny thinks he's going to propose and becomes a matchmaker. Cousin Pearl can't stand the idea that Elly May will get married before Jethrine, so she sets to matchmaking Jethrine with Jasper Depew.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Pygmalion and Elly" - Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Professionals

programme.title: Santa Fe Trail
programme.desc: Oscar winner Michael Curtiz (Casablanca, Mildred Pierce) directed this exciting drama about Army officer Jeb Stuart and the days leading up to the Civil War. Errol Flynn (The Adventures of Robin Hood) stars as Stuart, with Olivia de Havilland as his romantic interest (the seventh of nine times they were paired together by Warner Bros.) The cast includes Ronald Reagan as General George Custer, and Raymond Massey as John Brown, with such familiar faces as Alan Hale and Van Hefflin in supporting roles. Filmed partly in Santa Fe!

programme.title: The Red Rope
programme.desc: Hired killers and Old West outlaws stand front and center in this riveting tale from Hollywoods Poverty Row. Bob Steele, one of the busiest stars in movie history (everything from the silent era to Republic Pictures to working with Clint Eastwood in Hang Em High) is here as Tom Shaw, the target of a bad mans desperation and hate. Steele appeared in more than 240 movies and television shows, but was never more impressive than in The Red Rope!

programme.title: Stagecoach to Denver
programme.desc: Ride the outlaws' highway! Allan Rocky Lane stars as Red Ryder, shootin' and fightin' his way to justice in this old slugfest from Republic Pictures. This time he's a stagecoach driver battling a crooked land commissioner and his cohorts, including a sheriff on the take. Robert Blake costars as Little Beaver!

programme.title: A Lust to Kill
programme.desc: An imprisoned outlaw escapes and goes on the hunt for his brothers murderers, who just happen to be members of the outlaws own gang. He and his beloved hit the trail, but are pursued by local law enforcement, who have their own plans for justice. Starring Don Megowan, Jim Davis, and Allison Hayes.

programme.title: Law of the Pampas
programme.desc: Murder below the Equator...and Hopalong Cassidy races to action in the heart of the wild Pampas country !Hoppy (William Boyd) and his pal Lucky (Russell Hayden) head to South America to look after a herd of cattle sold by Cassidy's boss to an Argentine rancher. Unfortunately, the scoundrel Ralph Merritt (Sidney Blackmer) wants the cattle, and he's not above hiring some dangerous characters to do his dirty work. It's a test of blazing guns...under a blazing sun! Can the boys of Bar 20 lay down the law in a lawless place like the Pampas? Can Hoppy and his gang succeed in what is truly a last frontier? Watch and see!

programme.title: Cisco Kid
programme.desc: Cisco witnesses a dog identifying the murderer of his master. He then tries to prove that the dog is right. Starring Duncan Renaldo as The Cisco Kid, and Leo Carillo as Pancho. This weekly adventure series was a favorite of the 1950s, following two pals as they traveled the old west, righting wrongs and helping the underdog. The show was produced by ZIV Television, the same company that gave us Highway Patrol and Sea Hunt, and was nominated for a Primetime Emmy in 1951. This episode aired in 1950.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Guest Danielle Sepsy of The Hungry Gnome joins the kitchen to bake her famous, plush Honey Corn Muffins. As the muffins bake, Clinton and Danielle test Carla and Michael's Long Island accents in a hilarious roleplay game. They also play Chew It or Screw It, share Thanksgiving food disaster stories, and give away a $75 gift card to Danielle's bakery to a fan in Virginia.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Kicking off Thanksgiving week, Clinton Kelly prepares a seasonal Delicata Squash Salad with goat cheese and pepitas. As the crew enjoys the autumn flavors, they discuss Thanksgiving versus Friendsgiving, dive into a comprehensive timeline for holiday prep, and give away a prize to a lucky fan from Oregon.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving Eve, and Carla Hall takes the stress out of holiday cooking with her fast and flavorful Turkey Scallopini topped with a Cranberry Gastrique. The hosts share their best organizational tips, including Michael's famous oven grid and platter sticky notes. The trio also swaps hilarious stories about cooking under pressure and celebrity encounters.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's the Friday after Thanksgiving, and Chewed Up is all about transforming leftovers into brand-new masterpieces. Carla Hall whips up a decadent Ice Cream Pecan Pie using leftover pie slices, while Michael Symon cooks a savory Stuffing Frittata. The hosts confess their favorite late-night leftover habits, debate mayonnaise brands, and share wild stories about flying with pets.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: In this Fan Fridge episode, Michael Symon battles a stubborn blender to create a Whipped Cottage Cheese Dip with crispy mortadella chips. The crew embraces the pre-holiday scramble, sharing funny stories about morning commutes and paper cuts.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: During "holiday reset week," Clinton Kelly bakes a festive Stromboli Wreath in a bundt pan. The hosts discuss their vastly different childhoods, play "Holiday Do or Don't," and Michael shares a hilariously horrifying mix-up involving the Hotel Chelsea in New York.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Special guest Liz Symon joins the kitchen to bake her foolproof Orange Olive Oil Cake. While she bakes, Liz and Michael laugh off a viral AI rumor that they divorced, reveal their morning Wordle routines, and recall a disastrous early date involving bad crab stuffed shells.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Guest Amy Sedaris joins the crew for a festive break! Michael leans into his Greek heritage to bake savory Spanakopita triangles, while Clinton and Amy get crafty making adorable "Pinecone Gnomes." The group plays "Chew It or Screw It," debates edible glitter, and shares their most hated foods.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's "Holiday Reset Week"! Carla Hall brings a comforting yet lighter meal to the table: Roasted Cauliflower Steaks served with a creamy cauliflower puree and buttery breadcrumbs. The hosts debate the best Christmas movies, Clinton pitches "Bean Week," and the studio briefly loses power!

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly bakes an impressive yet simple "Invisible Apple Cake" loaded with thinly sliced apples, cinnamon, and nutmeg. The crew discusses the dangers of mandolins, Michael gets emotional recalling a surprise restaurant visit, and they debate holiday party etiquette.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon welcome comedian Jackie Fabulous as a special guest for a festive holiday episode just two weeks before Christmas. Carla makes a festive holiday ham as the crew mixes holiday cheer, storytelling, and Carla's warm comfort food with Jackie's standout comedic energy.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes center stage with his prized Prime Rib roast, walking through his technique for low-and-slow roasting and his signature horseradish cream sauce with sour cream and fresh grated horseradish. The hosts share holiday meal traditions, discuss fermented foods and gut health, and celebrate the elegance of a classic holiday beef centerpiece.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: Spring is here, and so is a special bunny who comes into our lives bearing deliciousness and joy: Chris Ying with a new Easter episode of Recipe Club. In this episode, our Club members brought an Easter feast. Nico de Leon, chef at Lasita, brings the lechon his restaurant is known for. LA Times writer and journalist Gustavo Arellano brings his family’s recipe for zacatecas-style capirotada. And none other than Chris’ wife, Jami Witek, manager at Zero Footprint, brings potatoes in the form of gratin dauphinois.Let’s hop to it and find out whose recipe is the best for Easter.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: C is for Cookie, and RC is for Recipe Club! We had our friends bring cookies to swap, taste, and debate. Baker Nicole Rucker brought a cookie game-changer: Jacques Torres’ Famous Chocolate Chip Cookie. She traded with podcasting legend Hrishikesh Hirway, who brought a Brown Butter Chocolate Chip Coconut Pecan Cookie. Baker Jennifer Yee brings her own White Lotus cookie to swap. For whom will C stand for Champion? Tune in and find out the best cookie recipe!

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: How are you feeling? Our Recipe Club members are kind and wanted to do something nice for you: they cooked a Meal Train recipe. They shared, tasted, and debated these comforting dishes. Chef and partner at Yangban John Hong made a variation on Caldo de Pollo. Previous season of Recipe Club champion and author John DeBary made the listener-requested Lasagne of Love. Beloved Dinner Time Live and Recipe Club member Mandy Roberts brought Golden Get-Well Soup. All of these dishes will make you feel better…but which will make you feel best? Hop on and find out which is the best Meal Train recipe!

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: Alone at last. Some peace and quiet, and a meal all to ourselves. Except we’re with our other Recipe Club members, of course. Becky Joiner brings in her Leftovers Crunchwrap. Chef Marc Johnson has his Indian Butter Chickpeas. And Chris Chen has some good ol’ Golden Japanese Curry. It’s Dinner for One, but we forced them to share, discuss, and decide whose recipe is best.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: It’s 5 o’clock somewhere, and that somewhere is right here on Recipe Club! Mandy Roberts pulled up with Devils on Horseback. David Chang brought an Aguachile. And Tommy Brockert of LaSorted’s LA brought a Tortilla Española. Want to know which is the best happy hour recipe? Pull up a barstool and join us!

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: Open the trunk and start pre-gaming…it’s time for a Recipe Club tailgate. Becky Joiner repped her hometown with some Crab Cakes. Darin Bresnitz, author/host of Snacky Tunes brought Pulled Pork. Pijja Palace owner Avish Naran brought some Texan Frito Pies. Who needs to go to the game when we’ve got food like this at the tailgate? Which recipe is best, though? Pull up a foldable chair and find out.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: It’s a beautiful day for a picnic, so grab your basket and head to Recipe Club! Marc Johnson brought a royally tasty Coronation Chicken Salad. Mandy Roberts put together a lovely Fattoush Salad. And Scott Clark of Dad’s Luncheonette brought his delectable homemade Onboard Oreos. But no picnic is complete without a winner: so whose recipe is best? Take a seat on the blanket and find out!

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati travels to Milpa Alta to harvest and char nopales with Chef Jorge Córcega, then joins Luis Alvarado’s family for their storied mole. Over a shared meal, they celebrate how tradition and flavor nourish the community.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits Tlatelolco’s Gris with Gabriela Rojas to reflect on tragedy and hope, then learns danzón at Salón Los Ángeles with Miguel Nieto. With friends, they share chamorro de cerdo and toast resilience with creative micheladas.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati traces Mexico City’s past with Erika Zúñiga, from Templo Mayor to Bellas Artes and a churro stop at El Moro. With Enrique Acevedo at Central de Abastos, they enjoy tacos de lengua and explore the city’s vibrant present and future.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Coffee expert Joey Chase goes on a pilgrimage along an ancient Ethiopian trading route that starts with the modern latte art cafes in Addis Ababa, then through the coffee kingdom of Jimma to the 10,000+-year-old wild coffee Yayu Forest. Village elders share the age-old secrets of hand processing, fire-pit roasting, and brewing of beans followed by a traditional feast.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: After sharing a first-ever taste of coffee in a remote Maasai village, followed by an exploration of the terrain with some new-found friends, Joey explores a grandiose coffee estate in Mt. Kenya. He then jousts with coffee buyers in Nairbobi's auction house and experiences the hand sorting and elaborate tasting of over 100 distinctive coffees in a British Tudor-style plantation cottage.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Touting the practicality of gondola travel, Joey explores the canals of Venice and discovers the oldest coffee shop in Europe. The trail to classic Italian espresso leads from Illy Coffee near the high-fashion metropolis of Trieste to the medieval town of Scarperia where espresso machines are manufactured. Florence boasts a famous barista who prepares a masterful farewell espresso.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: An exploration of Paris's distinctive cafe culture reveals a renaissance of coffee-inspired cuisine, pastries, and spirits. World-renowned "Noses" in the south of France reveal the complex contribution that fragrance and aroma make toward the perfect cup as Joey pursues the development of a coffee perfume.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Bob Marley's son Rohan takes Joey on a journey from the streets of Kingston to the peaks of the Blue Mountains. From waterfall plunges and grazing tropical fruits on Rohan's farm to roasting the smoothest coffee on earth and enjoying a Jamaican feast that ends with a Marley-hosted jam session, Joey discovers the pulse of Jamaica through the lens of Marley Coffee.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: From four-star cuisine to cappuccino on horseback, Joey explores the historic cobblestone streets and coffee estates of Antigua. A puddle jumper flight along the rims of active volcanoes leads to the age-old Mayan towns around Lake Atitlan where coffee-harvesting communities offer a glimpse of ancient traditions.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: The pursuit of the sweetest "honey" coffees on earth unleashes an adventure that includes "coffee monkeys", crocodiles, toucans, an exploration of the active crater of Volcan Poas, and surfing on the coast with a coffee farmer. The Costa Rican paradise reveals a uniquely artistic approach toward colorful honey coffees stored like wine and served just in time for a classic "coffee sock" brew.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Joey hits the streets of Bogota to check out the controversial trade in emeralds, the famous Juan Valdez Cafe, and some classic Colombian cuisine at an elevation of 10,000 feet. A flight to Armenia and subsequent Willy's Jeep trek uncover a remote and hidden world of quaint coffee towns and boutique farms where Joey hosts a group of international coffee buyers.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Joey is welcomed to Sao Paulo with a freshly brewed cup of excellence at The Coffee Lab in the trendy Madalena district. Joey checks out big coffee exporting in the Port of Santos with shipping containers stacked like legos, Jaco bird coffee (foraged from bird poop), and the world's largest savannah grassland, where Daterra Coffee Farms researches small-lot coffees on a massive scale.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Following an excursion to the extremely remote Gnobe Bugle Village, Joey Jeep-treks the terrain from the top of Volcan Baru. The search for coffee known to cost $1,000 per pound leads Joey to the eclectic town of Boquete, a plunge-worthy volcanic river-filled-crevasse, and awe-inspiring Gesha coffee farms with more rainbows and hummingbirds than one could possibly imagine.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Joey embarks on a journey through streets that have a 500+-year coffee history of scandal, triumph, and tragedy, from Hagia Sophia, the Blue Mosque and Topkapi Palace to coffee-infused nargile (hookah) and the trendy Karakoy District. Joey discovers and prepares the ultimate Turkish brew at Cup of Joy in time to catch the 13th-century coffee-inspired Whirling Dervish dancers.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: In the wake of an expedition along the slopes of active volcanic calderas, Joey heads to Big Island Coffee where coffee, cacao, and papaya abound, sheep maintain the landscaping, and the coffee tastes like pop rocks. A Jurassic-inspired detour leads through Akaka Falls, the green turtle pools, and a vanilla bean farm. A salt-massaged coffee is celebrated with Rusty's Hawaiian Coffee Farms.

programme.title: Moments in Time with Elia Locardi
programme.desc: Elia accidentally discovers the perfect spot for a sunrise shot of Kuala Lumpur, then meets-up with Grey Chow, a longtime friend and native. They venture outside the city to explore the Batu Caves, one of Malaysia's biggest attractions.

programme.title: Moments in Time with Elia Locardi
programme.desc: Elia shares advice on traveling with camera equipment and navigating Tokyo's subway system. He visits a peaceful garden then heads to the crowded Shibuya Crossing. Lastly, he visits the Photo History Museum and speaks with Sam Minami.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: Hot-spiced cider and strains of "O Tannenbaum" warm our hearts as we head to Europe for Christmas. Switzerland has a special glow this time of year and we find plenty of good cheer in the bright Christmas markets and toasty ski lodges.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: Friendly and feisty, Scotland makes us feel right at home. In Edinburgh, we climb the ramparts of this city's famous castle, shop for kilts, visit mysterious Rosslyn Chapel and gasp on a ghost tour. Then we head to historic St. Andrew's to practice our swing on the world's most famous golf course.

programme.title: Rudy Maxa's World
programme.desc: Dramatic photography by renowned shooters Karel Bauer and Joe Pontecorvo bring Hong Kong into viewers' homes as never before. Stray from the iconic photo of Hong Kong as a wall of skyscrapers against Victoria Peak with the city's harbor in a foreground and visit the other side of the island.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: At the romantic San Angel Inn, Rick enjoys what might be the most passion-infused food in the Mexican canon: a quintessential plate of perfect chiles rellenos. In the Frontera kitchen, Rick provides a detailed lesson on how they are made.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: We find Rick and his daughter, Lanie, at Mexico City's colorful Sonora Market, an emporium of medicinal herbs and the best place to buy cazuelas. They also check out El Guero, an institution in Mexico City popularly known as "Tacos Hola!"

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Jorge Vallejo is among Mexico City's rare chefs. His food has inspired Rick and Deanne for many years, but what inspires Jorge? One word: Tacos. Rick follows Jorge on a taco tour, from Tacos Gus to Taqueria Los Cocuyos, it is taco time.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: How do you transform a simple piece of fresh fish into a gorgeous Yucatecan specialty? The secret is in the magic paste, says Rick. Amid the fragrant Merida market, explore the region's colorful, aromatic, and essential recados.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Nothing captures the spirit of a day at the beach in Mexico than a fresh seafood cocktail or ceviche, and Rick finds a classic version in Mexico City. Then, he visits a major-league marisqueria, and shares his tips for homemade ceviche.

programme.title: Mythical Roads
programme.desc: With Gods Roads, Kings Roads, and Silver Roads behind us, dart off on "The Path of Truancy"&#157; in France. From Plouha in Brittany travel across inspiring France and meet people who have decided to free themselves from formal conventions and systems to follow their personal legend.

programme.title: Mythical Roads
programme.desc: From its origins in the Black Forest, to its passage through Vienna, to its delta in the Black Sea, the Danube River flows for over 1,000 miles and crosses through six countries, each bearing witness to 25 centuries of European history. Travel the glorious Danube from Hapsburg, Austria to Budapest.

programme.title: Outside: Beyond the Lens
programme.desc: New Zealand is a landscape cinematographer's dream. In search of the perfect frame, the Beyond the Lens crew travels to South Island where they venture off-the-beaten path and discover a range of exceptional photographic opportunities.

programme.title: Green Tourism
programme.desc: In Spain, we will visit a successful ecological hotel that chose to base the concept of its design on prefabrication. First, we will fly to Tanzania where we will find one of the most beautiful ecolodges on the continent of Africa.
